projectBrief.objective: Implement comprehensive Hebrew translation for Shelly's complete journey using MCP-First approach
projectBrief.scope: Customer portal, Typeform, AI responses, contracts, future agents, RTL support
successCriteria: Complete Hebrew interface for customer portal
constraints: Must use MCP servers for implementation
Must support both Hebrew and English
Must be ready for tomorrow's delivery

ideas.title: Hebrew Future Agents
